segments.text: Indian students can now work for one of the largest energy firms in the world.
Shell has just launched an incredible paid internship program for students across India. This is a golden opportunity for those in their
penultimate year of college. Regardless of your stream or institution, you'll gain hands-on experience in diverse roles across commercial, corporate, and
technical departments. The internship will run for 10 to 12 weeks starting in April 2026, and you'll receive a valuable certificate upon completion.
Applications close in November 2025. So don't miss your chance to kickstart your career with a global leader. Ready to take the next step? Check the link in
bio and subscribe to Full Disclosure for
